source_description: Upgrade Minoo from waaseyaa/* ^0.1.0-alpha.180 to ^0.1.0-alpha.182 and adopt the fail-closed SqlEntityQuery access-checking contract introduced in alpha.181 (#1495). 135 getQuery() call sites in src/ must be audited and converted to one of three legal shapes (setAccount, conditional fallback, accessCheck(false) bypass) per the framework's docs/security/sql-entity-query-access-check-bypass-audit.md pattern.
